title: Hadoop MapReduce Output Committer Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory manages committer operations in Hadoop MapReduce, ensuring data integrity. It contains classes for data structures, diagnostic info, and file/directory entry status. The 'impl' subdirectory holds custom exceptions for output validation errors. The 'stages' subdirectory uses the Observer pattern for event handling in committer stages, employing the Abstract Factory pattern for creating related objects, thus maintaining consistency in MapReduce processes.
